title: Fix /sales route error and implement comprehensive invoice creation system

requirements.summary: Fix the error on the /sales route preventing access to invoice creation
acceptanceCriteria: The /sales route loads without errors
Users can access the invoice creation interface
No 'Something went wrong!' error is displayed

file_operations.description: Debug and fix the error causing 'Something went wrong!' display on the /sales route. Check for null/undefined values in data fetching, ensure all required queries have proper loading and error states, add error boundary handling, and verify that all dependencies (customers, recipes, invoices) are loaded before rendering child components. Add fallback UI for loading states.

requirements.summary: Implement customer dropdown in invoice form with pre-registered customers
acceptanceCriteria: Invoice form displays a dropdown of all pre-registered customers
Customer dropdown shows customer name and mobile number
Selected customer's information is linked to the invoice

file_operations.description: Enhance the customer selection section to display a searchable dropdown (using shadcn/ui Select or Combobox component) populated with pre-registered customers from the getCustomers query. Display customer name and contact info (mobile number) in each dropdown option. Update form state to store the selected customerId. Ensure the dropdown is accessible and filterable by name or contact info.

requirements.summary: Add inline customer creation capability in invoice form
acceptanceCriteria: Invoice form includes an option to add a new customer inline
User can input customer name without pre-registration
New customer entry is validated before invoice creation

file_operations.description: Add a 'Create New Customer' option in the customer dropdown that opens an inline form or dialog. Include fields for customer name, contact info (mobile), and address. Validate the new customer data (name and mobile are required). On submission, call the addCustomer backend method to create the customer, then automatically select the newly created customer in the invoice form. Handle success and error states with appropriate user feedback.

requirements.summary: Display all recipes with search and filter interface in invoice form
acceptanceCriteria: All recipes are displayed in the item selection interface
Search functionality filters recipes by name
Filter interface allows quick item lookup

file_operations.description: Enhance the recipe/item selection interface to display all available recipes from getAllRecipes query. Add a search input field that filters recipes by name in real-time. Implement a filterable list or grid view using shadcn/ui components (Command, Combobox, or Select with search). Show recipe name and bowl size for each option. Ensure the interface is responsive and user-friendly for quick item selection.

requirements.summary: Display recipe prices alongside names in item selection
acceptanceCriteria: Each recipe displays its price in the selection interface
Prices are clearly visible next to recipe names
Price formatting is consistent across all recipes

file_operations.description: Update the recipe selection interface to display the unitPrice for each recipe alongside the recipe name and bowl size. Format prices consistently using currency formatting (e.g., ₹XX.XX). Ensure the price is visible in both the dropdown/selection list and in the added line items table. The price should auto-populate the unitPrice field when a recipe is selected.

requirements.summary: Enable adding multiple recipe items with quantities to invoice
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add multiple line items to one invoice
Each line item includes a recipe and quantity
Users can add, edit, and remove line items before saving
Invoice displays all added items with their quantities

file_operations.description: Verify and enhance the existing line items functionality using react-hook-form field arrays. Ensure users can add multiple line items by selecting a recipe, entering quantity, and clicking 'Add Item'. Each line item should display recipe name, bowl size, quantity, unit price, and calculated line total. Provide edit and remove buttons for each line item. Display all line items in a table or list format. Validate that at least one line item exists before allowing invoice submission.

requirements.summary: Capture comprehensive invoice details including customer info, items, pricing, date, payment method, notes, and tax
acceptanceCriteria: Invoice form captures customer information
Invoice form captures all line items with quantities and prices
Invoice date is recorded (defaults to current date)
Payment method dropdown is available (cash, card, UPI, etc.)
Notes field allows additional information entry
Tax calculations are included in the invoice total
All captured data is displayed in invoice details view

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive fields to the invoice form: invoice date field (with date picker, defaulting to current date), payment method dropdown (cash, card, UPI matching PaymentMode enum), optional notes textarea, and tax calculation fields (tax percentage input and calculated tax amount display). Ensure all fields are integrated with react-hook-form. Update the form submission to include all captured data in the InvoiceInput payload sent to createInvoice backend method. Add proper validation for required fields.

Enhance the invoice details dialog to display all comprehensive invoice information including invoice date, customer details, all line items with quantities and prices, subtotal, discount, tax breakdown (percentage and amount), total amount, payment method, and notes. Format all data for readability. Ensure the dialog fetches complete invoice data using getInvoice backend method and related customer/recipe information.

requirements.summary: Display appropriate messaging for inventory deduction (backend-handled)
acceptanceCriteria: When an invoice is saved, the backend calculates ingredient requirements based on recipes and quantities
Ingredient quantities in inventory are automatically reduced
If insufficient inventory exists, display an error and prevent invoice creation
Inventory adjustments are recorded with reference to the invoice ID
Users can view inventory deduction history linked to invoices

file_operations.description: Enhance error handling for invoice submission to display user-friendly error messages when inventory deduction fails due to insufficient stock. Parse backend error responses and show specific ingredient shortfall information to the user. Add a success message after invoice creation confirming that inventory has been automatically updated. Provide a link or reference to view inventory adjustments.

Add a section or tab to display inventory adjustment history. Use the getInventoryAdjustments backend method to fetch adjustment records. Show adjustments with timestamp, ingredient name, quantity changed, reason (sale/restock), and related invoice ID if applicable. Provide a link to view the invoice details when an adjustment is linked to an invoice (relatedInvoiceId present).

requirements.summary: Calculate and display invoice totals in real-time
acceptanceCriteria: Subtotal updates automatically as items are added or quantities change
Discount field allows percentage or fixed amount entry
Tax percentage is applied to calculate tax amount
Total amount reflects subtotal minus discount plus tax
All calculations are displayed clearly in the invoice form

file_operations.description: Implement real-time calculation logic using react-hook-form's watch functionality or useEffect. Calculate subtotal by summing all line item totals (quantity × unitPrice). Add discount field with toggle for percentage or fixed amount. Calculate discounted subtotal. Add tax percentage input and calculate tax amount on the discounted subtotal. Calculate and display final total amount (subtotal - discount + tax). Display all calculation steps clearly: Subtotal, Discount, Subtotal after discount, Tax (with percentage), and Total Amount. Update calculations immediately when any line item, quantity, price, discount, or tax value changes.
